## Summary

<!-- 1-2 sentences describing what changed and why. Link to the issue if applicable. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change to public Dart API
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / repo hygiene
- [ ] Refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] `dart format` clean
- [ ] `flutter analyze` clean (no new warnings)
- [ ] `flutter test` passes
- [ ] If touching native code, smoke-tested on a real device or simulator
- [ ] If user-visible, README and CHANGELOG updated
- [ ] If behavior change, called out in CHANGELOG with the version bump
- [ ] If touching iOS knownMailApps, the example app's Info.plist `LSApplicationQueriesSchemes` updated to match
- [ ] If touching the method-channel envelope, both Android and iOS native sides updated in the same PR
